title: iris borzaeana
intro: Iris borzaeana, a member of the Iridaceae family, is a type of flowering plant commonly known as the 'Romneya' or 'Carmel Creeper'. The plant's rhizome and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iris borzaeana include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and helping to manage respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Iris borzaeana can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote healthy digestion.
